title: Mishandling of a sized localparam bit selector
body:
The problem is demonstrated by the module below:

```
module test_genvar2localparam
        (
         output [3:0] d_o         
         );
        generate
                genvar   i;

                for (i = 0; i < 4; i = i + 1) begin : loop
                        localparam [1:0] di = i; // 0 1 2 3
                        assign d_o[di] = 1'b1;
                end
        endgenerate
endmodule
```

Expected result:

assign d_o = 4'b1111;

Actual result:

Warning: Range select out of bounds on signal '\d_o' at test_genvar2localparam.v:11: Setting result bit to undef.
Warning: Ignoring assignment to constant bits at test_genvar2localparam.v:11:
    old assignment: 1'x = 1'1
    new assignment: { } = { }.
Warning: Range select out of bounds on signal '\d_o' at test_genvar2localparam.v:11: Setting 1 LSB bits to undef.
Warning: Ignoring assignment to constant bits at test_genvar2localparam.v:11:
    old assignment: 1'x = 1'1
    new assignment: { } = { }.
